heading: Purnim West vs Pyalong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Purnim West, Victoria and Pyalong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Purnim West has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Pyalong (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Purnim West or Pyalong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Purnim West has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Pyalong scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Purnim West scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Pyalong scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Purnim West or Pyalong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Purnim West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
